LightningComponentBundle.description: A responsive page header component that displays a title with primary and optional secondary action buttons. Follows SLDS 2.x design patterns with proper accessibility and semantic markup.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Page Header with Title and Action

property.name: title
property.label: Page Title
property.description: The title text displayed in the page header

property.name: primaryActionLabel
property.label: Primary Action Button Label
property.description: Label text for the primary action button

property.name: secondaryActionLabel
property.label: Secondary Action Button Label
property.description: Label text for the secondary action button

property.name: showSecondaryAction
property.label: Show Secondary Action
property.description: Controls whether the secondary action button is displayed
